'''Gabi''' was a [[Container transport|Container Transport]] located at an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] scrap yard in [[Tolig IV]]. Its cargo was electronics. It was present there when [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace]] and [[Emon Azzameen]] went there to investigate the various containers to search for their [[Azzameen family|family's]] [[Comm Datacore]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
